title: quality.gate.passed|failed.v1 payload
description: Shared payload shape for BOTH the quality.gate.passed.v1 and quality.gate.failed.v1 events (single payload file, two channels — approved plan §2 event row). Thin notification projection of domain/verification-result.
$comment: compat_class: open (event payload, ADR-0012/ADR-0024). Authority: approved plan §2 event row (docs/... virtual-cooking-map.md §2, §5 'event/ 6종', quality-gate-result deliverable 2); field shapes mirror domain/verification-result/v1 where present there (patch_unit_id, gate_id, failures[$ref common/error-detail], report_uri). Deliberately NO status field here — the discriminator between passed/failed lives at the envelope's event_type / AsyncAPI channel address level (two channels sharing this one payload schema), not duplicated as a payload property. R4 channel-layer enforcement (approved plan §1.1 R4, R8): failed.v1 ⇒ failures required / passed.v1 ⇒ failures key absent is NOT expressed in THIS file (this file only declares failures as optional+open) — it is enforced by the AsyncAPI allOf-overlay at the channel/operation layer in packages/contracts/asyncapi/saena-events/v1/asyncapi.yaml (see quality.gate.passed / quality.gate.failed channel message payload overlays), mirroring domain/verification-result's own bidirectional if/then at the single-file layer. NO additionalProperties:false (open class).

patch_unit_id.$comment: mirrors domain/verification-result/v1#/properties/patch_unit_id shape (free string, minLength 1); contract-catalog.md idempotency key component.

gate_id.$comment: mirrors domain/verification-result/v1#/properties/gate_id shape — deliberately not an enum (canonical gate list lives in quality-gates.yaml, not this schema).

failures.$comment: mirrors domain/verification-result/v1#/properties/failures — each item is the closed common/error-detail shape (error_code/retryable/summary only). Channel-layer overlay (see file $comment) constrains presence per passed|failed channel; this file alone only declares the shape.

report_uri.$comment: mirrors domain/verification-result/v1#/properties/report_uri — optional pointer to a full gate report artifact; uri_ref forbids query/fragment (ADR-0024(f)).
